{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Clan Hall
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Clan Hall]] is where young Wei souls are tested.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Clan Hall]] contains a stone fox statue.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
